title: School capacity in England: academic year 2023 to 2024
body: "This release includes information as reported by local authorities as of 1 May 2024 on:   primary and secondary state-funded school places sixth form capacity unfilled school places and pupils in places that exceed their school’s capacity   It also provides:   local authorities’ pupil forecasts up to 2028 to 2029 at primary level and 2030 to 2031 at secondary level local authorities’ planned changes to school places up to 2026 to 2027 the departments modelled estimates of the future number of school places needed to meet predicted demand specialist provision capacity the capacity of special educational needs unit and resourced provision in mainstream schools local authority forecast demand for specialist provision    School Capacity   Robert MillerPupil Place Planning team     Email SCAP.PPP@education.gov.uk        "
